abilities.name: Chow Time
abilities.text: After this model removes a Remains or enemy Scheme marker, it gains a Glutted token.

abilities.name: Frenzied Charge
abilities.text: This model may Charge while engaged and ignore the once per activation restriction on Charge.

abilities.name: Thick Fat
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may remove a Glutted token to reduce the damage dealt by 2.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Enraged
triggers.text: Once per activation. This model may declare the Charge action.

triggers.name: Collateral Damage
triggers.text: Remove a marker or a destructible terrain piece within 2" of the target.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Rooting Around
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a Remains or Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Move this model up to 4" toward the target, then remove the target.

triggers.name: Panicked Piggy
triggers.text: When resolving, this model may move in any direction, ignoring models. Enemy models moved through this way are dealt 1 damage.
